_comment: Training-data cutoff registry. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD taken from provider documentation. null = not yet verified -- build_cutoff_partitions.py refuses to partition for models with null cutoff. Always record the source.

claude-sonnet-4-6.source: Anthropic models overview (platform.claude.com), verified 2026-06-11: training data cutoff Jan 2026, reliable knowledge cutoff Aug 2025. Conservative choice: training data cutoff.
